para_trans: Transferred to "Director General of Police" category

Second Floor, Mantralaya, Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
For transfer to the post of "Director General of Police" category:
of the IPS officer mentioned in column (2) of the table, from the post specified in column (3),

Orders of the Administrative Tribunal / Court, Model Code of Conduct for elections,
Further appropriate action should be taken keeping in mind law and order, etc.
